tools.name: ripgrep
tools.summary: Fast recursive text search for code and logs.
use_cases: Search TODOs, API usage, and error strings
Drive code review automation and refactor prep
tools.why_not_rebuild: Mature regex engine, high performance, excellent CLI ergonomics.

tools.name: fd
tools.summary: Friendly and fast file discovery alternative to find.
use_cases: Filter files by extension and path patterns
Compose with xargs and ripgrep in scripts
tools.why_not_rebuild: Consistent UX, speed, and ignore file support already solved.

tools.name: jq
tools.why_not_rebuild: Battle-tested expression language and stable behavior.

tools.name: yq
use_cases: Automate config updates in CI scripts
tools.why_not_rebuild: Already handles YAML edge cases and cross-format conversion.

tools.name: just
tools.summary: Task runner with simple syntax for repeatable dev commands.
use_cases: Replace brittle shell aliases with named recipes
Publish one command catalog per repo
tools.why_not_rebuild: Great readability and predictable command orchestration.

tools.name: uv
tools.summary: High-performance Python package and environment manager.
use_cases: Pin reproducible lockfiles for Docker builds
Run Python tools in isolated environments
tools.why_not_rebuild: Fast resolver and integrated environment management.

tools.name: watchexec
tools.summary: Run commands on file changes for tight feedback loops.
tools.why_not_rebuild: File watching portability and debouncing are already solved.

tools.name: mise
tools.summary: Unified runtime manager for Node, Python, Go, and more.
tools.why_not_rebuild: Cross-language version management is complex and solved well here.
